items.title_en: Trump says U.S. will 'go right back to dropping bombs' if he doesn't like Iran deal
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，如果他不喜欢伊朗协议，美国将“立即重新投掷炸弹”
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesday at the G7 conference that the U.S. will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周三在七国集团会议上表示，如果他不喜欢伊朗协议，美国将“立即重新投掷炸弹”。

items.title_en: Snap unveils $2,195 smart glasses after previous flops
items.title_zh: Snap 继之前的失败后推出售价 2,195 美元的智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.title_en: CNBC to simulcast 11 WNBA games this season
items.title_zh: CNBC 将联播本赛季 11 场 WNBA 比赛
items.desc_en: The simulcasts will expose the WNBA to an affluent audience on CNBC and marks a new chapter for the business news network after it spun out from Comcast.
items.desc_zh: 这些联播将在 CNBC 上向富裕的观众展示 WNBA，并标志着这家商业新闻网络从康卡斯特分拆出来后翻开了新的篇章。

items.title_en: Abercrombie & Fitch begins selling third-party shoe brands in latest bid to chase growth
items.title_zh: Abercrombie & Fitch 开始销售第三方鞋履品牌，以追逐增长
items.desc_en: Abercrombie & Fitch's explosive growth has slowed, leading the apparel retailer to expand into new categories to boost sales
items.desc_zh: Abercrombie & Fitch 的爆炸式增长已经放缓，导致这家服装零售商拓展新品类以提高销售额

items.title_en: Mortgage rates are now falling but demand is still weaker
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率正在下降，但需求仍然疲弱
items.desc_en: A mixed week for mortgage rates resulted in less demand from both current homeowners and potential homebuyers.
items.desc_zh: 本周抵押贷款利率好坏参半，导致当前房主和潜在购房者的需求减少。

items.title_en: Micron has more than tripled in 2026. Deutsche Bank says the rally isn't over

items.desc_en: Micron Technology is poised to see even more upside as a memory shortage continues to be a boon for its business, per Deutsche Bank.
items.desc_zh: 德意志银行表示，由于内存短缺继续为其业务带来福音，美光科技有望看到更多的上涨空间。

items.title_en: Hundreds of cats stolen for food in Vietnam rescued by police, welfare group says
items.title_zh: 福利组织称，越南数百只被盗用作食物的猫被警方救出
items.desc_en: Police have arrested nine people and rescued more than 400 cats destined for slaughter, with more than 40 reunited with their owners.
items.desc_zh: 警方逮捕了 9 人，解救了 400 多只准备被宰杀的猫，其中 40 多只猫与主人团聚。

items.title_en: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
items.title_zh: 英国调查报告称俄罗斯军舰在英吉利海峡附近的游艇附近鸣枪示警
items.desc_en: BBC News understands the yacht had drifted towards the Admiral Grigorovich, a Russian frigate which has been operating in the Channel.
items.desc_zh: 据英国广播公司新闻了解，这艘游艇已漂向一直在英吉利海峡执行任务的俄罗斯护卫舰格里戈罗维奇海军上将号。

items.title_en: Snapchat SPECS
items.title_zh: Snapchat SPECS
items.desc_en: Powerful computer built into lightweight see-through glasses
items.desc_zh: 轻巧的透视眼镜内置强大的计算机

items.title_en: France's oldest female detainee, 79, goes on trial for in-law's grisly murder
items.title_zh: 法国最年长女性被拘留者，79岁，因残忍谋杀姻亲而受审
items.desc_en: A dismembered body found in a chain-bound trunk in the Seine in 1995 was only recently connected to the defendant by DNA evidence.
items.desc_zh: 1995 年，在塞纳河的一个用链子捆住的箱子里发现了一具被肢解的尸体，直到最近才通过 DNA 证据将其与被告联系起来。

items.title_en: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
items.title_zh: Carvana 正在扩展到新车领域。其影响可能重塑美国汽车零售市场
items.desc_en: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.
items.desc_zh: 自去年以来，Carvana 已购买了 7 个新车特许经营权，主要销售 Stellantis 的克莱斯勒、道奇、吉普和公羊品牌。

items.title_en: Five big questions about the UK's under-16s social media ban
items.title_zh: 关于英国 16 岁以下青少年社交媒体禁令的五个大问题
items.desc_en: A ban is coming - but it's still not clear what it will mean for sites including Roblox, YouTube and WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: 一项禁令即将出台，但目前尚不清楚这对 Roblox、YouTube 和 WhatsApp 等网站意味着什么。

items.title_en: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯艺术家和普京评论家在波兰被枪杀
items.desc_en: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.
items.desc_zh: 罗伯特·库佐夫科夫（Robert Kuzovkov）使用笔名谢苗·斯克雷佩茨基（Semyon Skrepetsky），因其对弗拉基米尔·普京（Vladimir Putin）等政客的漫画而闻名。

items.title_en: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
items.title_zh: Helium-3 是什么？我们可以从月球上获取它吗？
items.desc_en: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.
items.desc_zh: Hel-3 价格昂贵，而且需求预计会猛增，因此一些人计划在月球上开采它。

items.desc_zh: 永远不会错过竞争对手的举动

items.title_en: Under-16s will be banned from social media from early 2027
items.title_zh: 从 2027 年初起，16 岁以下青少年将被禁止使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: Sites including Instagram, YouTube and TikTok will become inaccessible for millions of children, the prime minister has announced.
items.desc_zh: 总理宣布，数百万儿童将无法访问 Instagram、YouTube 和 TikTok 等网站。

items.title_en: Social media ban - bold and blunt, but no silver bullet
items.title_zh: 社交媒体禁令——大胆而直率，但没有灵丹妙药
items.desc_en: The BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman on the big changes coming down the line for young people online.
items.desc_zh: BBC 技术编辑佐伊·克莱曼 (Zoe Kleinman) 讲述年轻人上网即将发生的重大变化。

items.title_en: What is the UK social media ban for under-16s?
items.title_zh: 英国针对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体禁令是什么？
items.desc_en: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat blocked for UK teens early in 2027.
items.desc_zh: 这些措施将使英国青少年在 2027 年初屏蔽 TikTok 和 Snapchat 等应用程序。

items.title_zh: Deep Work Plan

items.desc_zh: 模型很重要。背景更重要。给你的代理人一个计划。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's stratospheric rise to trillionaire status - in charts
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 跃升为万亿富翁——图表
items.desc_en: The BBC breaks down how the tech mogul's fortune has grown.
items.desc_zh: BBC 详细分析了这位科技大亨的财富是如何增长的。

items.title_en: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
items.title_zh: 谁是埃隆·马斯克？他的净资产是多少？
items.desc_en: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person - and might even soon become a trillionaire.
items.desc_zh: X、特斯拉和 SpaceX 的老板是世界首富，甚至可能很快成为万亿富翁。

items.title_en: Social media on trial: Four important cases to watch
items.title_zh: 审判中的社交媒体：四个值得关注的重要案件
items.desc_en: Social media firms face thousands of lawsuits, the BBC looks at four which could be significant.
items.desc_zh: 社交媒体公司面临数千起诉讼，英国广播公司 (BBC) 调查了四起可能影响重大的诉讼。

items.title_en: Kalshi to make some users reveal job details to tackle insider trading
items.title_zh: Kalshi 要求部分用户透露工作细节以应对内幕交易
items.desc_en: After issues with insider trading, the prediction betting platform is adding new rules.
items.desc_zh: 在出现内幕交易问题后，预测博彩平台正在添加新规则。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Check before check-in. What's behind a new safety campaign about power banks on aircraft?
items.desc_zh: 入住前请检查。关于飞机上移动电源的新安全运动背后的原因是什么？

items.title_en: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布
items.desc_en: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders
items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.desc_zh: 为中小企业预约的人工智能业务运营商。
